items.name_en: M14282 Grey-White Clay
items.name_cn:
M14282 Grey-White Clay
This Go-14 Medium bag, designed by Creative Director Nicolas Ghesquière, draws inspiration from the Barcelona Güell Park, the setting of the 2025 Cruise early spring show. It features sprayed-effect lambskin to mimic the park's vibrant colors. The iconic Malletage quilting pattern is accented with eye-catching metal hardware, while pockets and a makeup mirror add functional details.
16 x 10 x 23 cm
(H x W x L)

items.name_en: M14680 Monogram White Color. Nicolas Ghesquière presents the Rivage BB handbag for 2025 Spring/Summer, reinterpreting the Noctambule bag launched in 1999, cut from Monogram canvas in a bucket silhouette. Hard case style handle, engraved lock, and leather luggage tag highlight classic elements; wear the strap for convenient crossbody carrying. Dimensions: 18*7*12cm.

items.name_en: M17779 Silver Buckle
items.name_cn:
M17779 Silver Buckle
Soft Monogram Unplant leather embossed with a pattern, highlighting the elegant design of the "Portefeuille Sara NM". A rectangular wallet featuring a silver buckle on an envelope-style flap. Equipped with 2 compartments with pockets, a zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots, making the well-organized interior very appealing.
Dimensions: 19 10.5 2.

items.name_en: M20250 Monogram This Slim Trunk handbag draws inspiration from the Louis Vuitton classic trunk, incorporating riveted borders and metal S-lock buckles into soft calfskin, showcasing a rock-chic style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. Dimensions: 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M22303 m22304【LOCKME EAST WEST 】
items.name_cn:
M22303 m22304【LOCKME EAST WEST 】
The new LockMe East West chain bag is full of 1990s metropolitan flair and is a wardrobe staple for both day and night occasions. Grainy calfskin shapes a simple structure, establishing an elegant foundation together with the smooth chain shoulder strap and LV Twist lock. It can hold a wallet or phone and other daily necessities.
Size: 23.5 x 14 x 6 cm

items.name_en: M23640 Full Leather Embossed Square Bag Collection New Fall/Winter ONTHEGO EAST WEST Handbag M23698 This OnTheGo East West handbag reinterprets the East West spacious structure with the OnTheGo small tote design, using Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the body, and the neat interior can hold daily essentials. Top handles and a detachable leather chain strap allow for multiple carrying ways. 25 x 13 x 10 cm.

items.name_en: M24042 Rose Twist PM LV Bloom bag features exquisite floral details and mood-lifting colors, a tribute to spring. Made of exquisite grained Epi leather, it features a polished two-tone LV turnlock and a removable chain handle adorned with enamel Monogram floral patterns. Removable leather smart straps enhance the versatility of this delicious feminine accessory. 19 x 15 x 9 cm (Length x Height x Width)
